students.title: Study Abroad
students.body: Helping international students access world-class education in Canada, the United States, Ireland, Germany, Poland, Australia, China, and the United Arab Emirates through trusted university partnerships and licensed immigration consultants.

workers.title: Work in Canada
workers.body: Helping Francophone skilled workers secure a Canadian job offer and immigrate through the Francophone Mobility work permit — no LMIA required.

trust.quote: "The future belongs to those who can imagine it, design it, and execute it. It isn't something you await, but rather create."

welcome.title: Welcome to Masomo Now
welcome.p1: Masomo Now is the Francophone Africa division of <1>ELIMU International Education Connections</1>, a Canadian education consultancy based in Vancouver, British Columbia.
welcome.p2: We help students successfully apply to universities and colleges abroad by providing expert guidance on admissions, visas, and student preparation from application to arrival.

video.eyebrow: Take a look inside one of our partner schools
video.title: A first look at TRU, Kamloops, BC
video.caption: TRU — Thompson Rivers University, a real Masomo Now partner school.

features.title: RCIC Licensed Support
features.description: Professional immigration guidance backed by licensed Canadian consultants.

features.title: Trusted Partner Institutions
features.description: Study at carefully selected colleges and universities across eight countries.

features.title: Personalized Guidance
features.description: Every student receives advice tailored to their goals, budget, and academic background.

features.title: End-to-End Support
features.description: From your first consultation until you settle into your new campus.

destinationsShowcase.title: Where we send our students
destinationsShowcase.subtitle: Real partner institutions across eight countries — matched to your goals, budget, and language preference.

items.title: University Transfer
items.description: Transfer credits into a university degree.

fmcHighlight.title: Why Apply Under the FMCSP Pilot Program?

items.title: Priority Processing
items.desc: FMCSP applications are processed faster than standard study permits.

items.title: A Pathway Toward Permanent Residence
items.desc: Graduating outside Quebec strengthens your Express Entry profile.

items.title: Full Settlement & Arrival Support
items.desc: We prepare you for life in Canada, from pre-departure to arrival.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: We proudly work with 21 trusted institutions across Canada, the United States, Ireland, Germany, Poland, Australia, China, and the United Arab Emirates.

items.name: Amara M.
items.quote: Masomo Now made what seemed impossible feel completely manageable. From my BCIT application to my study permit — every step was guided. I'm now in Vancouver.

items.name: Jean-Pierre M.
items.quote: I came from DRC and didn't think studying in Canada was possible. Masomo Now found the FMC pilot for me — now I'm studying in French in Ontario.

graduation.caption: A Masomo Now / ELIMU student at their Canadian convocation.

cta.title: Ready to Study Abroad?
cta.body: Book a free consultation with one of our advisors and receive a personalized study pathway based on your academic goals.
